_meta.notes: Per-account, per-period rows. Filters apply row-level matching by company/BU/object/subsidiary. Bar chart history derived from same rows aggregated by period.
_meta.cardexNote: v6ui_itemrollintegritydialog has no PeriodEnds column — it is a current-state integrity report, not period-historical. The cardex drilldown shows the same rows regardless of which period is selected; only the sidebar Company / Object / BU / Subsidiary filters narrow it.
